baseline.observed: improve_prompt_inner used GLM_CODING_MODEL directly when present, so a blank configured model would be sent in the GLM request body instead of defaulting to glm-4.6.

red_test.result: FAILED before implementation because glm_model_from_env was missing and the old inline lookup did not filter blank values.

change.summary: Added DEFAULT_GLM_MODEL and routed model selection through a helper that ignores blank GLM_CODING_MODEL values.

verification.result: PASS: Vite build, 31 library tests, 13 CLI tests, and strict clippy passed.

safety_controls: No live GLM call was required for model selection coverage.
Existing non-empty GLM_CODING_MODEL values are preserved.
Blank model values now fail safe to the documented default model.
